## What this changes

A short description of the change and the motivation.

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / website
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] **Protocol-level change** (REST/MCP API, staking/economics, state machine) —
      linked to an accepted proposal per
      [GOVERNANCE.md](https://github.com/Pacta-Protocol/Pacta.Protocol/blob/main/GOVERNANCE.md)

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused on one concern.
- [ ] Tests pass locally (see the repository's `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behaviour changes.
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, per the DCO).
- [ ] I read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Pacta-Protocol/.github/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots.
